title: Deliciously Energizing Greek Lamb Keftedes
description: A traditional Greek dish with a twist, these keftedes are packed with energizing ingredients like kombu cold extract and demerara sugar, making them a perfect snack or appetizer. The combination of lamb, mustard, and spices creates a flavorful and aromatic experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ground lamb, demerara sugar, kombu cold extract, whole wheat breadcrumbs, Dijon mustard, dried oregano, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Mix everything together with your hands or a wooden spoon until just combined.
Add the egg to the bowl and mix until the mixture is cohesive but not overmixed.
Use your hands to shape the mixture into small keftedes, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Place the keftedes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each keftede.
Drizzle the olive oil over the keftedes and gently roll them around to coat evenly.
Bake the keftedes in the preheated oven for 18 minutes, or until they are cooked through and lightly browned on the outside.
Remove the keftedes from the oven and let them cool on a wire rack for a few minutes before serving.
